ratings.comment: Nice guy, very caring. Do the homework and you will get an A.
Mandatory attendance, super clear on content. Follow his rule and you will get an A
He is so nice that can get an A easily. He will give detailed feedback and if you followed, you get good grades
Canvas is seldom used and attendace is required.
Barely uses canvas so attendance is a must!

I am glad I got Professor Corona for ESL 118. He genuinely cares about his students and gives good feedback on papers. You need to attend his classes though, as he did not use canvas for the course and gave homeworks during his lectures. Also, all homework submissions were hard copy. If you follow his feedback, you can get an A easily.
